summary: Iteration 25: Role Switching Feature - All tests PASSED. Backend: 12/12 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All role-based UI features verified working correctly.

issues: Google Maps RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key domain restriction (known issue from iteration_24)

backend_api_tests: GET /api/auth/me - returns roles array and active_role for carer (provider)
GET /api/auth/me - returns roles array and active_role for client
PUT /api/auth/switch-role - carer can switch to client role
PUT /api/auth/switch-role - carer can switch back to provider role
PUT /api/auth/switch-role - fails if user doesn't have target role (400)
POST /api/auth/add-role - fails if role already exists (400)
POST /api/auth/add-role - fails for invalid role type like 'admin' (400)
Lazy migration - user gets roles array auto-created from role field
Integration test - full role switch flow works end-to-end
frontend_ui_tests: Login as cuidador@test.com (provider mode) → GREEN navbar (bg-emerald-700)
Login as cuidador@test.com → CUIDADOR badge visible
Login as cuidador@test.com → Role switcher button shows 'Cambiar a Cliente'
Provider menu: Mi Panel, Mensajes, Historial (NO 'Buscar Cuidadores')
Click 'Cambiar a Cliente' → switches to RED navbar (bg-[#E6202E])
After switch → Role switcher shows 'Cambiar a Cuidador'
Client menu: Mi Panel, Buscar Cuidadores, Mensajes, Historial
Switch back to provider → GREEN navbar restored
Login as cliente@test.com (single role) → RED navbar
Single role client → Role switcher NOT visible
Single role client → 'Ser Cuidador' button visible

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test users from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 - Role Switching Feature tested successfully. Key features: 1) PUT /api/auth/switch-role - multi-role users can switch between client and provider. 2) POST /api/auth/add-role - single-role users can add a second role. 3) GET /api/auth/me - returns roles array and active_role. 4) Backend lazy migration - old users without roles array get it auto-created from role field. 5) Frontend - GREEN navbar (bg-emerald-700) for provider, RED navbar (bg-[#E6202E]) for client. 6) Provider menu: Mi Panel, Mensajes, Historial (no Buscar Cuidadores). 7) Client menu: Mi Panel, Buscar Cuidadores, Mensajes, Historial. 8) Role switcher button only visible for users with both roles. 9) 'Ser Cuidador' button visible for single-role clients, navigates to /provider/register. 10) cuidador@test.com has both roles, cliente@test.com has single client role.

switch_role_api.PUT /api/auth/switch-role: PASS - Multi-role users can switch between client and provider
switch_role_api.role_validation: PASS - Returns 400 if user doesn't have target role

add_role_api.POST /api/auth/add-role: PASS - Users can add second role (client or provider)
add_role_api.duplicate_prevention: PASS - Returns 400 if role already exists
add_role_api.invalid_role_prevention: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid roles like 'admin'

auth_me_api.GET /api/auth/me: PASS - Returns roles array and active_role
auth_me_api.provider_info: PASS - Included for users with provider role

lazy_migration.roles_array_creation: PASS - Old users without roles array get it auto-created

frontend_role_switcher.multi_role_visible: PASS - Visible for users with both roles
frontend_role_switcher.single_role_hidden: PASS - Not visible for single-role users
frontend_role_switcher.switch_text: PASS - Shows 'Cambiar a Cliente' or 'Cambiar a Cuidador'

frontend_menus.provider_menu: PASS - Mi Panel, Mensajes, Historial (no Buscar Cuidadores)
frontend_menus.client_menu: PASS - Mi Panel, Buscar Cuidadores, Mensajes, Historial

known_issues.google_maps: RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key domain restriction (external config, not code bug)
